creator: burak.sn@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Zhenlei Huang from comment #26)

Ok you are right . I cloned stable/12 from git just now and patched vxlan

so now i have:

FreeBSD test 12.4-STABLE FreeBSD 12.4-STABLE #0 stable/12-n235817-fb7823f55ce7-dirty: Fri Nov  4 10:12:06 +03 2022  

Then i set up the scenerio it seems it works!

Thanks for your work.

FreeBSD test 12.4-STABLE FreeBSD 12.4-STABLE #0 stable/12-n235817-fb7823f55ce7-dirty: Fri Nov  4 10:12:06 +03 2022     root@test:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/TEST  amd64
